svg.text: Koe Hub v2 -- Pi CM5 Pro Audio Carrier Board
140x120mm | 4-layer FR-4 | ES9038Q2M DAC | nRF5340 BLE Audio | ADAT | TPA6120A2 HP | M.2 NVMe | DW3720 UWB
140x120mm | 4-layer | 85 parts | Pi CM5 + nRF5340 BLE + DW3720 UWB + ES9038Q2M DAC + ADAT + NVMe
4x TRS + 2x XLR in | ADAT 8ch I/O | BNC word clock | M.2 NVMe | 2x Speakon + HP out
HUB v2 ~$52 BOM | ES9038Q2M 129dB SNR | TPA6120A2 120dB HP | nRF5340 7x BLE Audio | NVMe recording
v1: 2x PCM5102A + DW3000 | v2: ES9038Q2M + nRF5340 BLE + ADAT + TPA6120A2 HP + M.2 NVMe + BNC WCLK
